raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tn eſt tawu Dwehfeli
&glahbuſi/ ſteigdamees peemuh-
i Kunga no-eet/ un nu nahz uſ
vixxa Telti/ un zitti no mumſ
awaddihs tewi/ ka tee tew win-
xa Rohkâ eedohd:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad tu winna Breek-
cha ſtahwei/ tad ne bihſtees ta-
wâ Sirdi/ bet ſtahſti winnam
chohs tawus Wahrdug/ tad
wiſch tew labba darrihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee iſlaſtija no ſewis
ints Wthrus/ un peedewe tohs
vixnat un winnas Mettai/ un
ee nowaddija to us Olowernus
Telti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tur iatezzefa wiſs Leh-
eris/ jo ta Slawa no winnas
Atnahkfchanas teſpande pa wiſ-
ahm Teltim: Un tee atnahze un
iahweja wiſsapfahrt winnu/
ad winna ahra preeſch Olo-
vernuſ Telts ſtahweja/ kamehr
ee winnam no tahs Sinzu
etwe.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee brihntjahs pahr
winnas Skaistumu/ un brihnt-
ahs winnas pehz arridsan pahr
eem Iſräeta Behrneem/ un iaẓ-
tija zits us zittu: Kas warretu
chohs Laudis ſmahdeht/
kam
ahdas skaistas Seewas irr ? ne
peederrehs nekahdu no winnu
Wihreem atlizzinaht/ kad tee pa-
aisti kkuhtu/ tad tee warretu
wiſfu Vatauli peewilt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz iṣgahje Olowernus
Wahtinceki un wiſi winna Sul-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Olowernus duſſeja us
fatwu Gultu ais tahm Gardi-
ehm/ kas no Purpura un Sel-
ta un Simragdeem un dahrgein
Akmineem bija fa-anſtag.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee winnam no
tahs iazzija: tad iṣgahje wiṇsch
eelſch tahs Telts Breekſch Iſta-
bas/ un Sudraba Lukturi tappe
winnam preeſch nefți.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Juhdite no win-
na un winna Sullaineem redse-
ta ktua/ tad brihntjahs wiſſ
pahr winnas Skaistumu: Un
ta mettehs us fawn Waigu/un
peeluhdſe winnu: Bet winna
Kalpi iṣehle to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XI. Nodalla.
N Olowernus iazzija
us to: Turrees labbt
Prahtu Geetwka/ ne
bihſtees tawâ Sirdi/ jo es wehl
ne weenam Zilwekam efmu kan-
na darrijs / kas aprehmees ir
Nebukadnezaram tam Rehnizam
wiſas Semmes kalpoht!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Buhtu arri tawi Laudis/
kas ſchinnis Ratnu-Weetäs dih-
wo/ manni ne nizzinaſchi/ es ne
buhtu prett winneem mannu
Schkehpu pazehlis/ bet tee ire
paſchi few to eedruppinaſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Nu tad/ fakki man: Ka-
pehz tu no winneem behguſi un
pee mumſ nahkuſi? jo tas tew
par labbu buhs/ ka tu eſſi atnah-
kusi. Turrees labbu Prahtu/ tu
palikſi ſcho Nakti un jo prohjam
diſhwa.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
